title: Remove authentication and create basic admin welcome page

requirements.summary: Remove all Internet Identity authentication logic from the AdminLoginPage component
acceptanceCriteria: Internet Identity login button is removed from the admin page
No authentication checks occur when accessing the admin area
All Internet Identity related UI elements are removed from the admin login page

file_operations.description: Remove all Internet Identity authentication logic including the login button, useInternetIdentity hook usage, email verification state, and admin user checking logic. Remove all authentication-related UI elements and error states.

requirements.summary: Transform the AdminDashboardPage into a simple welcome page displaying 'Welcome Admin'
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays 'Welcome Admin' as the primary heading
Clean, simple dashboard layout with no complex functionality
Page is accessible without any authentication requirements

file_operations.description: Simplify the AdminDashboardPage to display 'Welcome Admin' as the main heading. Remove authentication details display including principal ID, identity state, and logout functionality. Keep only the branded header and create a minimal welcome layout with navigation to home.

requirements.summary: Update the Admin button in ContactFooter to navigate directly to admin dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Admin button in the footer immediately opens the admin dashboard
No login page or authentication prompt appears
Navigation works seamlessly from any page in the application

file_operations.description: Update the Admin button navigation to link directly to '/admin/dashboard' instead of '/admin/login'. Change the link href to bypass the login page entirely.

requirements.summary: Remove or bypass admin authentication hook that validates admin access
acceptanceCriteria: Admin page loads without calling backend admin verification
Page renders immediately without authentication state checks

file_operations.description: Remove the useQueries checkAdminUser hook call and all related authentication state checks. Remove any conditional rendering or redirects based on authentication status. Ensure the page renders immediately without backend verification calls.
Update the admin route configuration to point directly to AdminDashboardPage at '/admin' path. Remove the '/admin/login' route entirely so the admin button navigates directly to the dashboard page.
